candidate_definition_hints.text: The NuGet documentation contained in this repository is hosted in [NuGet documentation](https://learn.microsoft.com/nuget/). This repository was migrated from the former NuGetDocs repository, https://github.com/NuGet/NuGetDocs, which is no longer in active use.
